rows.scenario: AppendEdge(w=3) -> Compact (fully successful) -> AppendEdge(w=5) -> Compact again
rows.expected: Second Compact's LoadCSR shows Weight=8 (3+5) for the EdgeEntityCooccur edge, not 3; edge is not lost
rows.also_covered_by: TestCompaction_SecondAppendAfterSuccessfulCompactionIsNotLost (pre-existing, same scenario plus a third round-trip)

rows.scenario: Segment numbering never reused across TruncateNode calls (repeated append/compact cycles on same node)
rows.expected: wal.WriteSegmentFloor monotonically advances; no collision with stale compact-state sidecar entries

rows.scenario: Crash-injected truncate failure retry (F1, distinct from F2 covered here)
rows.expected: No double-counting of EdgeEntityCooccur weight on retry
